design_rationale: Apple Weather-style premium dashboard focusing on immersive dynamic gradient backgrounds paired with frosted glass panels (optical clarity). The UI elements must adapt contrast based on the underlying atmospheric background.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Control Room Variant) adapted for Weather Dashboard
layout_and_spacing.base_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-12
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside glass panels (p-6 to p-8) to ensure breathing room from frosted edges.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main panels, rounded-2xl for inner cards, rounded-full for buttons and icons.

primary_glass.classes: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative z-10

interactive_elements.classes: transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg hover:bg-white/20 active:scale-95 cursor-pointer

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up entry for bento grid items using Framer Motion (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}`)
motion_and_interactions.weather_transitions: Smooth crossfade (duration: 1s) when switching weather condition themes.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Soft glow effects or slight background opacity increase on glass elements.
motion_and_interactions.loading_skeleton: Shimmer effect using `animate-pulse` mixed with `bg-white/10` blocks instead of standard gray skeletons.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Recharts tooltip needs to use glassmorphism styling (`backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border border-white/20`).

components_strategy.search: Floating centered search bar with glassmorphism, glowing ring on focus. Use Autocomplete drop-down.
components_strategy.weather_hero: Displays Current Temp, Location, 'Feels like', and an immersive weather icon/animation. Large, thin typography.
components_strategy.forecast_weekly: Vertical list, dense data, alignment is key. Icon + High/Low bars.
components_strategy.forecast_hourly: Horizontal scrollable graph using Recharts `AreaChart` with gradients under the curve. Smooth, bezier interpolation.
components_strategy.bento_metrics: Square cards for AQI, UV Index, Humidity, Wind. Use subtle SVG icons and emphasize the primary number.

background_textures.description: Warm sunny abstract glass texture overlay. Add `mix-blend-overlay` and low opacity (`opacity-40`).
Dark blue rain condensation texture. Add `mix-blend-overlay` and medium opacity (`opacity-60`).
Dark purple night sky texture. Add `mix-blend-screen` and low opacity (`opacity-30`).
Fluffy overcast cloud texture. Add `mix-blend-overlay` and low opacity (`opacity-40`).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Since backgrounds vary, use dynamic text color utilities (e.g., swapping to dark text on 'sunny', light text on 'night/rainy'). Use text-shadow if contrast dips.
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Wrap Framer Motion animations to respect `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up Tailwind to include custom fonts in `tailwind.config.js` under `fontFamily: { sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], display: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif'] }`.
Use a centralized 'WeatherContext' or Zustand store to manage weather data, current location, and the dynamic theme state.
The root `App` component must dynamically apply the background gradient and the absolute-positioned texture image based on the current weather condition.
Construct the dashboard using `lucide-react` icons styled with gradients or simple clean strokes inside the glass bento cards.
Ensure the Recharts AreaChart uses a transparent background, white/dark grid lines (depending on theme), and a curved line (`type="monotone"`) with an elegant gradient fill.
The 7-day forecast should be a vertical list inside a single tall glass pane, maximizing use of space (Control Room Grid mode).
